---
title: "Manitoba Assessment Parcels — 3D Value Map"
subtitle: "437,000 parcels visualized with freestiler + mapgl"
author: "MBOpenData"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  message: true
---

## Overview

Interactive 3D map of Manitoba's ~437,000 property assessment parcels.
**Height** encodes total assessed value; **color** encodes municipality.

Pipeline: GeoParquet (from download script) → PMTiles (via freestiler) → 3D map (via mapgl).

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(duckdb)
library(DBI)
library(freestiler)
library(mapgl)
library(arrow)
library(geoarrow)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(fs)
library(glue)
library(cli)
library(scales)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

layer_name <- "mb-parcels"
pmtiles_file <- "data/mb-assessment-parcels.pmtiles"

# PMTiles URL for the deployed map (GitHub Releases — supports HTTP range requests)
pmtiles_url <- "https://github.com/jayschellenberg/MBOpenData/releases/download/v1/mb-assessment-parcels.pmtiles"
```

## Find Data

```{r}
#| label: find-data

parquet_files <- fs::dir_ls("data", glob = "*/mb-assessment-parcels-*.parquet")

if (length(parquet_files) == 0) {
  stop("No GeoParquet files found in data/. Run MBAssessmentParcels.qmd first.")
}

input_file <- sort(parquet_files, decreasing = TRUE)[1]
file_date <- stringr::str_extract(basename(input_file), "\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}")

cli_alert_success("Using: {basename(input_file)}")
cli_alert_info("Download date: {file_date}")
cli_alert_info("File size: {fs::file_size(input_file)}")
```

## Generate PMTiles

```{r}
#| label: generate-pmtiles

# Skip if PMTiles is newer than source parquet
needs_rebuild <- !fs::file_exists(pmtiles_file) ||
  fs::file_info(pmtiles_file)$modification_time <
  fs::file_info(input_file)$modification_time

if (needs_rebuild) {
  cli_alert_info("Generating PMTiles from {basename(input_file)}...")

  # Use freestile() with sf object (not freestile_query) because
  # DuckDB doesn't recognize geoarrow geometry as spatial type
  parcels_sf <- read_parquet(input_file) |>
    mutate(geometry = st_as_sfc(geometry)) |>
    st_as_sf() |>
    select(OBJECTID, Roll_No_Txt, Total_Value, Total_Value_Num,
           Property_Address, Municipality, Muni_Name_With_Typ,
           Dwelling_Units)

  freestile(
    input = parcels_sf,
    output = pmtiles_file,
    layer_name = layer_name,
    min_zoom = 5L,
    max_zoom = 14L
  )

  cli_alert_success("PMTiles written: {fs::file_size(pmtiles_file)}")
} else {
  cli_alert_info("PMTiles up to date: {fs::file_size(pmtiles_file)}")
}
```

## Explore Municipalities

```{r}
#| label: municipality-codes

parcels_df <- read_parquet(input_file) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  count(Muni_Name_With_Typ, sort = TRUE)

cli_alert_info("Found {nrow(parcels_df)} municipalities")
parcels_df |> head(20) |> knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
#| label: define-palette

# Define a categorical color palette for the top municipalities
# Colors chosen for visual distinction on a dark basemap
palette <- c(
  "#e74c3c",   # red
  "#3498db",   # blue
  "#2ecc71",   # green
  "#f39c12",   # orange
  "#9b59b6",   # purple
  "#1abc9c",   # teal
  "#e67e22",   # dark orange
  "#ec407a",   # pink
  "#26c6da",   # cyan
  "#ffca28",   # amber
  "#8d6e63",   # brown
  "#78909c"    # blue-grey
)

# Use top municipalities by parcel count for color coding
muni_names <- parcels_df$Muni_Name_With_Typ
muni_colors <- rep_len(palette, length(muni_names))
```

## 3D Map

```{r}
#| label: map-3d

maplibre(
  style = carto_style("dark-matter"),
  center = c(-98.0, 55.0),
  zoom = 5,
  pitch = 30,
  bearing = 0,
  projection = "mercator"
) |>
  add_pmtiles_source(
    id = "mb-parcels-source",
    url = pmtiles_url
  ) |>
  add_fill_extrusion_layer(
    id = "mb-parcels-3d",
    source = "mb-parcels-source",
    source_layer = layer_name,
    fill_extrusion_height = interpolate(
      column = "Total_Value_Num",
      values = c(0, 100000, 500000, 2000000, 10000000),
      stops = c(0, 50, 200, 600, 2000)
    ),
    fill_extrusion_color = match_expr(
      column = "Muni_Name_With_Typ",
      values = muni_names,
      stops = muni_colors,
      default = "#95a5a6"
    ),
    fill_extrusion_opacity = 0.8,
    tooltip = concat(
      "<strong>", get_column("Property_Address"), "</strong><br>",
      "Value: ", get_column("Total_Value"), "<br>",
      "Municipality: ", get_column("Muni_Name_With_Typ"), "<br>",
      "Roll: ", get_column("Roll_No_Txt"), "<br>",
      "Units: ", get_column("Dwelling_Units")
    ),
    hover_options = list(
      fill_extrusion_color = "#ffffff"
    )
  )
```

## Summary Statistics

```{r}
#| label: summary-stats

parcels_all <- read_parquet(input_file) |> as.data.frame()

summary_table <- parcels_all |>
  group_by(Muni_Name_With_Typ) |>
  summarise(
    count = n(),
    median_value = median(Total_Value_Num, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_value = mean(Total_Value_Num, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_value = if (all(is.na(Total_Value_Num))) NA_real_
                else max(Total_Value_Num, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(count)) |>
  mutate(
    median_value = dollar(median_value, prefix = "$", na.rm = FALSE),
    mean_value = dollar(mean_value, prefix = "$", na.rm = FALSE),
    max_value = dollar(max_value, prefix = "$", na.rm = FALSE)
  )

summary_table |> head(20) |> knitr::kable(
  col.names = c("Municipality", "Count", "Median Value", "Mean Value", "Max Value"),
  align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r")
)
```
